name: Chair Squat
instructions: Sit down and stand up from a stable chair, focusing on control and balance. Keep your knees aligned.

name: Wall Push-up
instructions: Place your hands on the wall at shoulder height. Lower your body in a straight line and push back up.

name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Lying on your back, lift your hips until your thighs and torso are aligned. Contract your glutes.

name: Resistance Band Row
instructions: Sit with your legs straight, band attached to your feet. Pull the band towards your abdomen.

name: Barbell Squat
instructions: Barbell on trapezius muscles. Squat keeping your back straight and knees out until thighs are parallel.

name: Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Lying on the bench, hold the bar at shoulder width. Lower it to your chest and push.

name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Legs almost straight. Lower the bar close to the thigh, pushing the hip back until you feel the stretch.

name: Barbell Row
instructions: Lean your torso forward ~45°. Pull the bar towards your navel, contracting your back.

name: Dumbbell Overhead Press
instructions: Press dumbbells overhead from shoulder height. Lock out at the top, control on the way down.

name: Deadlift
instructions: Hip hinge, neutral spine. Drive through the floor and lock hips at the top.

name: Pull-Up
instructions: Full ROM, chest to bar. Engage lats from the bottom.

name: Dips
instructions: Lean forward for chest focus. Full depth, control the descent.

name: Cable Fly
instructions: Wide arc, squeeze at centre of movement.

name: Lateral Raise
instructions: Slight forward lean, lead with elbow. Control the eccentric.

name: Barbell Curl
instructions: Strict form, no swing. Full range of motion.

name: Tricep Pushdown
instructions: Lock out at bottom, control on the way up.

name: Leg Curl
instructions: Slow eccentric, full stretch at bottom.

name: Calf Raise
instructions: Full ROM, pause and stretch at the bottom.

name: Steady-State Run
instructions: 65-75% max HR. Maintain a conversational pace.

name: HIIT Sprints
instructions: Max effort sprints. 30s all-out, 60s active recovery.

name: Jump Rope
instructions: Maintain a steady rhythm. Great for coordination and warm-up.
